case_title: RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. vs. GROVES, SHELLY M et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GROVES, SHELLY M DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-28-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-30-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUL-10-2000
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC. SERVED MAY-30-2000, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GROVES, SHELLY M

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY MATTHEWS ARTURO JR. HEARING SET FOR SEP-06-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-06-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON SEP-06-2000, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ARTURO E MATTHEWS, JR, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-21-2000 CONTINUED FROM SEP-06-2000 TO NOV-15-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF RISK MANAGEMENT ALTERNATIVES, INC.
